name: Dango Jiru (Dumplings with Miso)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add enough Mochi flour to make a stiff dough for dango, roll into small marble-sized balls and make a slight impression on each side by pinching.
2. Drop the balls into boiling dashi.
3. Cut the fish into small pieces. Grind the miso in a suribachi.
4. When the dango (dumplings) rise to the top of the pot, add the fish and the miso.
5. Add the gourmet powder and garnish with chopped green onions.
